manufacturerInfo.title: magneticManufacturerInfo
manufacturerInfo.description: Manufacturer information for the magnetic. Extends the shared manufacturerInfo with a datasheetInfo block for catalogue-level data.

datasheetInfo.description: All values extracted directly from the component datasheet, organised by domain.

distributorsInfo.description: The lists of distributors of the magnetic

rotation.description: The rotation of the magnetic, by default the winding column goes vertical

magneticDatasheetInfo.description: All values extracted directly from the component datasheet, organised by domain.

part.description: Basic part identification from the datasheet.

electrical.description: Electrical characteristics as stated in the datasheet.

thermal.description: Operating temperature range from the datasheet.

mechanical.description: Physical dimensions and mounting style from the datasheet.

application.description: Application parameters published by the manufacturer — describes the circuit this component was designed for, not the component's intrinsic electrical properties.

business.description: Packaging and supply-chain information from the datasheet or product page.

description.description: Human-readable product description as given in the datasheet or catalogue.

matchCode.description: Internal match / order code used by the manufacturer.

family.description: Product family or series name (e.g. WE-CMB, WE-CNSW).

caseCode.description: Case or package code / size reference (e.g. '0805', 'SMD-4P').

windingStyle.description: Winding construction style (e.g. bifilar, sectional, trifilar).

material.description: Core material designation as given in the datasheet (e.g. NiZn, MnZn).

numberOfWindings.description: Total number of electrically independent windings.

automotive.description: True if the part is qualified for automotive applications (AEC-Q200 or equivalent).

shielded.description: True if the component has a shielded construction.

insulationGrade.description: Insulation grade classification as stated in the datasheet (e.g. 'reinforced', 'basic'). Aligns with IEC insulationType vocabulary.

magneticDatasheetElectrical.description: Electrical characteristics as stated in the datasheet.

inductance.description: Inductance per winding in Henries, with tolerance.

dcResistance.description: DC resistance per winding in Ohms. nominal = typical value, maximum = datasheet max.

ratedCurrent.description: Rated DC current per winding in Amperes.

ratedVoltageDC.description: Maximum rated DC voltage between any two terminals in Volts.

ratedVoltageAC.description: Maximum rated AC voltage (RMS) between windings in Volts.

insulationTestVoltageAC.description: Hi-pot / dielectric withstand test voltage (AC RMS) in Volts.

insulationResistance.description: Minimum insulation resistance between windings in Ohms.

impedancePoints.description: Impedance vs. frequency points from the datasheet. Uses the same impedanceAtFrequency structure as designRequirements.minimumImpedance.

impedance.description: Impedance value. Uses the same impedancePoint structure as designRequirements.

maximumImpedance.description: Peak / maximum impedance magnitude in Ohms (frequency not specified in datasheet).

commonModeFilter.description: Common-mode filter performance figures from the datasheet.

saturationCurrentPeak.description: Peak saturation current in Amperes (I_sat from datasheet).

turnsRatio.description: Turns ratio (e.g. 100 means 1:100) for coupled inductors / transformers.

dcResistances.description: DC resistance per winding for multi-winding parts. Use dcResistance for single-winding parts.

magneticDatasheetApplication.title: MagneticDatasheetApplication
magneticDatasheetApplication.description: Application parameters published by the manufacturer in the datasheet. These describe the circuit the component was designed for, not the component's intrinsic electrical properties.

switchingFrequency.description: Nominal switching frequency in Hz for which this component is designed.

inputVoltage.description: Input voltage range for which this component is designed, in Volts.

outputVoltages.description: Output voltages per secondary winding in Volts.

outputCurrents.description: Output currents per secondary winding in Amperes.

cutOffFrequency.description: -3 dB cut-off frequency of the common-mode filter in Hz.

attenuation.description: Common-mode insertion-loss / attenuation value from the datasheet in dB.

attenuationTestCondition.description: Test condition string for the attenuation figure (e.g. '100 MHz, 50 Ω').

temperatureRise.description: Maximum temperature rise above ambient. Unit: K (numerically equivalent to a Celsius difference).

thermalResistance.description: Thermal resistance. Unit: K/W (numerically equivalent to °C/W).

diameter.description: Body diameter in metres (for cylindrical parts).

mounting.description: PCB mounting style. Uses the same connectionType enum as designRequirements.terminalType.
